title: Sniper Dan
short_description: Upcoming from Denki — outrageously funny, family-friendly 3D Hidden Object game
description:
Sniper Dan is an outrageously funny, family-friendly 3D Hidden Object game with a big twist. Use a high-powered sniper rifle to solve low-stakes problems. Scope the scene, spot the problem, and shoot the solution. No violence. Just wholesome chaos and good intentions!

Upcoming release from Denki, with Steam page listing a 2026 release window.
